nodes.label: Mirin
nodes.rationale: Provides a GUI for Android screen mirroring and control over USB and wireless TCP/IP connections.

nodes.label: Service Layer Pattern
nodes.rationale: React components must use service wrappers rather than invoke Tauri IPC directly.

nodes.label: Type Safety Bridge
nodes.rationale: Rust command structs and TypeScript definitions are manually synchronized.

nodes.label: Vercel Project Link
nodes.rationale: The local Vercel metadata links the directory to a project and must not be committed or shared.

nodes.label: Next.js Version Guidance
nodes.rationale: Agents must consult installed Next.js documentation because APIs, conventions, and file structure may have breaking changes.

nodes.label: ADB Binary Bundle
nodes.rationale: The production application bundles adb.exe and its required DLL dependencies; files must remain together and retain their names.

nodes.label: scrcpy Binary Bundle
nodes.rationale: The production application bundles scrcpy, its server, and all required DLL dependencies; files must remain together and retain their names.
